'''Wyveral''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Wyveral system/Legends|Wyveral system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] where many advances in forensic medicine were made.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
